sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 323 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.14. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2025 This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Diary demonstrates that on 11.12.2020, counsel requested for time to reformulate questions of law. The exercise appears not to have been done and even otherwise counsel remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
